title: LetMoreFishLove
description: An addon to LetFishLove that allows some modded fish to breed
body:
This is a simple addon mod to [LetFishLove](https://modrinth.com/mod/let-fish-love)

This addon allows some modded fish to be bread and lay roe from which new fish can hatch.

## Currently supported fishes and their favorite foods:

### [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)

*   Koi: cherries

### [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)

*   Perch: seeds (wheat)
*   Lionfish: tropical fish
*   Pike: salmon

### [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) (foods suggested by developers)

*   Bass: dried kelp
*   Catfish: dried kelp

### [Sully's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sullysmod)

*   Lanternfish: glow berries

Note: This mod will be update to 1.20 soon!

More mods will be supported in the future. Here is a list of mods I want to add compat for:

*   Alex's Mobs
*   Rainbow Reef
*   Unusual Fish Mod
*   Aquaculture

You can suggest more mods & the food item for each fish, in the comments or on github (I'd prefer github!!)
